name: Prediction Mode shows questions, accepts guesses, and displays calibration feedback
description: A logged-in user opens Prediction Mode (/app/focus), sees an explanatory science card and either a prediction session (with question cards, guess input, confidence buttons) or an empty state prompting them to create cards first. The page renders without errors.

planSteps.description: Log in with valid credentials and wait for the dashboard to load
Open Prediction Mode by navigating to the /app/focus route
If a tour or onboarding popup appears, dismiss it
Verify the page shows the heading 'Prediction Mode' and a science explanation card mentioning the pretesting effect — confirming this is the real Prediction Mode page and NOT a 404 or blank container

Verify the page shows EITHER a prediction session with a question card (text + a guess textarea + confidence rating buttons numbered 1 through 5 + a submit button) OR an empty state message prompting the user to create cards first — either indicates the feature rendered correctly
